channel.title: Ghost on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Ghost on Alien Truth Social

item.title: UFO Investigators League
item.description:
The UFO Investigators League (UFOIL) was a UFO group founded by Timothy Green Beckley in the early 1970s, which later re-emerged in 1990 in New Brunswick, New Jersey. Another chapter, founded in 1981 in Covington, Kentucky, investigated UFOs, ghosts, and Bigfoot sightings before disbanding in 1982. The Ohio UFO Investigators League (OUFOIL) operated a UFO hotline in 1973 from Fairfield, Ohio, and investigated various cases including the Loveland Lizard and Mothman. OUFOIL also hosted the 1978 MUFON Symposium and published a newsletter called “The Ohio Skywatcher.”

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/UFO_Investigators_League

item.title: Paulding Light
item.description:
The Paulding Light is a phenomenon observed in a valley near Paulding, Michigan, with reports dating back to the 1960s. Folklore has offered explanations such as ghosts, geological activity, or swamp gas. However, scientific investigations, including a 2010 study by Michigan Tech students, have concluded that the light is caused by automobile headlights and tail lights on a nearby stretch of US Highway 45. These students were able to recreate the effect by driving a car on that highway and observed vehicle lights through a telescope.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Paulding_Light
